title: TERMS OF SERVICE (Part 2/2)
heading_chain: Links to Parichay by other websites/portals
heading: TERMS OF SERVICE
text:
These links have been placed for your convenience. Parichay is not responsible for the contents of thelinked websites/services and does not necessarily endorse the views expressed in them. Merepresence of the link or its listing on this website should not be assumed as endorsement of anykind. We cannot guarantee that these links will work all the time and we have no control overavailability of linked destinations. ###### Links to Parichay by other websites/portals We do not object to you linking directly to the information that is hosted on this web site and no prior permission is required for the same. However, we would like you to inform us about any links provided to this website so that you can be informed of any changes or updates therein. Also, we do not permit our pages to be loaded into frames on your site. The pages belonging to Parichay must load into a newly opened browser window of the User. ####
Parichay, does not store user's personal information, it merely facilitates the verification of an individual's identity by directly authenticating with the government centric services accordingly. #### COOKIES POLICY A cookie is a piece of software code that an internet web site sends to your browser when you access information at that site. A cookie is stored as a simple text file on your computer or mobile device by a website's server and only that server will be able to retrieve or read the contents of that cookie. Cookies let you navigate between pages efficiently as they store your preferences, and generally improve your experience of a website. Parichay uses following types of cookies to enhance your experience and interactivity with its service:
